text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A box addressed to me from Eishin Flash's parents
arrives the day after her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Interwoven in its branches are berries, dried
flowers, and, on closer inspection, spices. It's a
beautifully symmetrical and intricate masterpiece.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Attached to it is a card with the message,
"Congratulations on debuting" written in
perfectly balanced Japanese characters.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I received the same wreath. The message affixed
to it was different, however.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"May the joy you felt at your debut continue
throughout your racing career." That is the wish
mine is imbued with.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I opened the box and smelled the faint
aroma of spices, I immediately knew it was made
by my mother's hand.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My mother has always had a fondness for
making wreaths.
choice_data_list: This is just a hobby for her?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That is correct. My parents excel at many things!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Both are dexterous and quick to learn whatever
they turn a hand to.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother has extraordinary sense for wreath
design, as you can see, and my father is
knowledgeable in many things outside the realm
of confectionery, as well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In fact, my mother was the one who designed
almost every piece of furniture in our house, and
my father was the one who built them!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They always shied away from praise, saying it's
amateur work, but it is truly gorgeous. I would
love to show you someday, actually!
choice_data_list: You must really respect your parents.
You must really respect your parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I do... I respect and admire them greatly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: To me, they are the symbols of what is right.
choice_data_list: Can you elaborate on what you mean?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Both my parents proudly saw through their own
chosen paths. For my mother, it was racing, and
for my father, it was baking.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"May you accomplish all you want on the path
you choose." That was the message written for
me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wish to live up to their expectations and carry
on as they do. However, I lack the ability to do so
as I am now.
choice_data_list: You don't think you have what it takes?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't. I'm still so inexperienced—I can't hold a
candle to my parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Once, when I was a child, I made a wreath under
my mother's instruction.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, mine paled in comparison to hers, so I
asked her how I could improve.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Experience is something you accumulate over
time," she told me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"If you interlace branches the right way and work
hard to do everything correctly, all will come
together beautifully in the end."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother always created a thorough plan for
her races—just as she did for her wreaths—and
carried it through to perfection.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I still lack the finesse and experience she has. My
schedule is designed to alleviate these
deficiencies of mine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will see this timetable through to the end and
become a better, more proper version of myself...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then, I can return to Germany with pride... and
show my parents who I have become.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her profound admiration for her parents
is what caused her to be fixated on doing things
the "right" way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she calmly talks about her grand plan, I can't
help but feel moved realizing it all stemmed from
her simple wish of wanting to make her parents
proud.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: If I may ask, where is your wreath now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Good. All looks well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I placed it next to your door. That space is in
shade year-round, so there's no danger of the
wreath losing color.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Think nothing of it. By the way, could we discuss
my training schedule?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, I would like to increase my training
load leading up to the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Learning how much my parents expect of me has
renewed my determination to improve further.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I previously said that I didn't want to set victory
as my goal. However... I wish for my mother to see
me win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she did mention how
passionate she was about the Derby when we first
talked about her three-year schedule.
choice_data_list: Why is the Derby so special to you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I suppose it's because...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, my mother showed me the
German Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The race left a strong impression on me, but then
my mother told me something.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She said that some races overseas, like the
Japanese Derby, are amazing too, and how
they're a true spectacle every single year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So, I asked her if I would be amazing if I ran in the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She answered with the largest smile that day,
saying, "You would be super, toll und klasse,
Flash!"

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All of those words translate to "amazing," but I
had never heard my mother use them in
succession with such excitement before.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Derby would surely make her happy.
That being the case, it would only be right to win
it.
choice_data_list: Making her happy is your dream, huh?
Making her happy is your dream, huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm unsure if "dream" is the correct word.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The visions we see while in deep sleep are also
"dreams." Thus, the word itself is vague and
intangible.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To me, bringing my mother joy is not a dream,
but a reality that I must make happen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to go over my training schedule
again to ensure I'll be able to win the Derby.
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now, concerning when I should start...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've learned a lot today about how important
Eishin Flash's parents are to her, and what it
means for her to do things the "right" way.
